transcription.text: romance somebody's trying to sell you a carpet wouldn't it be nice to buy a carpet like this just on glamour alone nice but that's why Lee's believes in glamour plus a back that can take a beating glamour plus good strong fibers and no skimping a pile that won't fall flat on its face Lee's gives you the glamour you want all right but we give you a lot more behind it a lot of good down-to-earth reasons for buying those heavenly carpets by Lee's
